scripts.migration:generate: corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/config build && typeorm-ts-node-commonjs -d src/database/data-source.ts migration:generate
scripts.migration:revert: corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/config build && typeorm-ts-node-commonjs -d src/database/data-source.ts migration:revert
scripts.migration:run: corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/config build && typeorm-ts-node-commonjs -d src/database/data-source.ts migration:run
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/config build && corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/editor-core build && corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/storage build && vitest run --passWithNoTests
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/config build && corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/editor-core build && corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/storage build && corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/job-queue build && corepack pnpm --filter @orbit/realtime build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
